body:
Release prepared and pushed. Branch release/gsta-51/ci-smoke-tests contains the CI smoke tests for tools API and admin endpoints and a small scraper test fix, plus a version bump to 0.1.3. I do not have a GitHub token in this environment to create the PR automatically.

Suggested PR title: chore(release): bump versions to 0.1.3 and add CI smoke tests (GSTA-47)

Suggested PR body summary:
- Bump package versions to 0.1.3 across root and workspace packages
- Add CHANGELOG.md entry documenting the CI smoke tests
- Add CI smoke tests for tools API and admin endpoints (GSTA-47)
- Include scraper integration test fix (safeReplace and validate helpers) to make tests reliable

Verification performed: ran repo test script (placeholder - no tests configured) and verified scraper integration test where applicable. Commit: dcacb15.

Create the PR via GitHub UI: https://github.com/AI-LLM-World/AI-Tools-Library/compare/main...release/gsta-51/ci-smoke-tests
Or run locally with gh CLI:
  gh pr create --base main --head release/gsta-51/ci-smoke-tests --title "chore(release): bump versions to 0.1.3 and add CI smoke tests (GSTA-47)" --body "See summary in issue comments."

If you want me to open the PR, provide a GITHUB_TOKEN or GH_TOKEN in the environment and I will create it now.
